title: Cobbled Tools - Cobblemon
description: A selection of Cobblemon themed tools.
body:
### Have you ever wondered how cool Tinkatons hammer is? 

Well now you can actually use it in Minecraft! 

Using some custom model data shenanigans you can transform your tools and weapons into some of your favourite pokemons tools with more being added over time. 

**Please make sure that you download the addtional Resource Pack along with the Data Pack.**
